title: RCS Legacy+
description: A TRIP TO NOSTALGIA, GIVE IT TO YOU FOR FREE BY RCS LEGACY...🌠
body:
**Welcome to RCS Legacy!** 

This is a modpack that converts your Java Minecraft into a Xbox 360 Edition Minecraft, specifically its TU1 version. This modpack seeks to recreate TU1 using mods and resource packs that transform Java Minecraft into TU1.

**Installation** 

• If you use a launcher that allows it, create a new instance with the base mod pack. • If you don't have such a launcher, follow these steps: 1. Unzip the .mrpack file. 2. Copy the Mods, Config, and Resourcepack folders to your Minecraft root folder, the .minecraft folder. 3. We recommend opening a new instance without mods or shaders to improve quality.

**Features**

RCS Legacy was created on mobile; it did not use a computer or Java. RCS Legacy recreates Minecraft TU1 from the Xbox 360 version.

**Support the team** 

We'd love your support for our project. Our donation links are PayPal only. Thanks for reading.🤗
